entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Wearable device provider used as data source for sleep and heart rate syncing

entities.name: workout_tracker
entities.context: Internal module that handles upserting daily sleep and resting heart rate data into a database

entities.name: Sleep Sync
entities.context: Process of syncing sleep data (score, minutes asleep, minutes in bed) from Fitbit into local storage

entities.name: Resting Heart Rate Sync
entities.context: Process of syncing resting heart rate data via Fitbit's heart time series batch endpoint

entities.name: api_get_json
entities.context: Helper function that makes authenticated GET requests to Fitbit API and returns JSON

entities.name: upsert_daily_sleep
entities.context: Database operation that inserts or updates daily sleep records with score, duration, and raw payload

entities.name: upsert_daily_resting_hr
entities.context: Database operation that inserts or updates daily resting heart rate records

entities.name: HEART_TIME_SERIES_URL
entities.context: URL template for Fitbit's heart rate time series batch API endpoint with start/end date parameters

relationships.context: Sleep data is sourced from Fitbit API and tagged with source='fitbit'
Heart rate data retrieved from Fitbit's activities-heart time series endpoint
workout_tracker module exposes upsert_daily_sleep for persisting sleep records
workout_tracker module exposes upsert_daily_resting_hr for persisting heart rate records
Makes authenticated API calls to Fitbit endpoints using OAuth token
Sleep sync pipeline calls workout_tracker.upsert_daily_sleep to persist data
HR sync pipeline calls workout_tracker.upsert_daily_resting_hr to persist data
Uses api_get_json to fetch heart rate time series from Fitbit API
